title: Lesson 81
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: an idea that helps someone decide what to do
words.example: My teacher gave me useful advice.
Living near school is an advantage.

words.meaning: a sound or device that warns people
how much there is of something
words.example: The amount of rain was surprising.

words.meaning: a living thing that is not a plant
words.example: The zoo has a rare animal.

words.meaning: a part of a place or subject
words.example: This area is quiet at night.

words.meaning: the body part from shoulder to hand
words.example: He broke his arm last winter.
The baby slept in the car.

words.meaning: a container used for carrying things
words.example: Put the books in this bag.

words.meaning: a round object used in games
words.example: The ball rolled under the table.
